history.content:
<thought>
I am currently facing up (north). The goal is to the right and slightly ahead. The cell directly in front of me is lava. Turning right will allow me to move to the right, which is a safer path towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing right. The goal is to the forward and slightly to the right. The cell directly in front of me is lava. The cell to my left is a wall. Turning left will allow me to move forward, which is a safer path towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing left. The goal is to the forward and slightly to the right. The cell directly in front of me is a wall. I need to turn right to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing down. The goal is to the forward and slightly to the right. The cell directly in front of me is lava. I need to turn right to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing right. The goal is to the forward and slightly to the left. The cell directly in front of me is a wall. I need to turn left to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing left. The goal is to the forward and slightly to the right. The cell directly in front of me is a wall. I need to turn right to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing down. The goal is to the forward and slightly to the right. The cell directly in front of me is a wall. I need to turn right to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing down. The cell in front of me is a wall. I need to turn right to move forward. I will turn right and then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing right. The goal is to the forward and slightly to the right. The cell in front of me is a wall. I need to turn left to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing left. The cell in front of me is a wall. I need to turn right to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing down. The goal is to the forward and slightly to the right. The cell in front of me is a lava cell, so I cannot move forward. I will turn right to head to the free neighbor cell at my right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing right. The cell in front of me is a floor cell. The goal is to the forward and slightly to the right. I can move forward to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
